cover.headline:
The POS for
operators who care
about their numbers.
cover.subtitle: An offline-first point-of-sale system engineered for arithmetic correctness. Built with accountant-grade shift rigor, true write-ahead offline sync, and advanced menu engineering logic—for the operators running serious food & beverage.

01.title: True Offline Resilience
01.body: We don't use fragile caching. The POS app utilizes a secure write-ahead queue to store orders, cash movements, and shift opens locally. When the internet comes back, it syncs flawlessly without double-charging or lost sales.

02.title: Built-In Barista Training
02.lede: Quality control baked into the till.
02.body: Recipes dictate the workflow. The system guides baristas step-by-step, automatically adjusting stock (like swapping oat milk for whole milk without double-counting) and ensuring perfect consistency across every branch, every time.

03.title: Algorithmic Menu Advisor
03.body: More than just sales reports. Our engine uses proven menu engineering math to score every drink on velocity and margin, offering mathematically defendable 'Lift, Hold, or Soften' price suggestions to maximize your profit.

04.title: Direct Support & Custom Logic
04.lede: A partnership, not a vendor roadmap.
04.body: You get a direct line to the creator. Need custom business logic built for your unique operation? It gets built on request, exactly how you need it. No waiting months for generic feature updates.

problem.eyebrow: Chapter 2 · The state of the art
problem.title: What today's POS gets wrong.

01.title: Treating offline as a failure.
01.body: Most modern systems treat offline as a total failure mode, leaving you stranded. The shop in Maadi shouldn't stop making money because the cell tower went down.

02.title: Poor local support by default.
02.body: Arabic timestamps, dual-brand printer support (Star & Epson), and right-to-left interfaces aren't optional toggles—they need to be native.

03.title: Hiding your own numbers.
03.body: Want yesterday's revenue filtered by branch, formatted cleanly in Excel with SUM formulas? Most systems make you file a ticket or wait for a morning email.

04.title: Operating without a ledger.
04.body: A POS that lets you ring sales without forcing the cash counts to reconcile is just a glorified calculator. Not a real accounting tool.

tellerHero.title:
Where the operation
meets the customer.
tellerHero.caption: The Madar teller — native, offline-first.

tellerDetail.title:
Built for speed
of service.
tellerDetail.body: Orders ring up in seconds. Modifiers are handled fluidly. First-class support for both Star and Epson printers without wonky drivers. Every action is saved instantly to the device first, then syncs backwards to the operation.

01.title: Split Payments
01.body: Cash, visa, and customer credit—with granular tipping per tender—handled in one pane.

02.title: Strict Modifiers
02.body: Modifiers are hard-linked to the recipe, preventing free-text chaos and protecting inventory.

03.title: Blind Drops
03.body: Mandatory cash counting at shift open and close, flagging discrepancies before the drawer locks.

featureMixedCheckout.title:
Flexible checkout
in one screen.
featureMixedCheckout.body: Customers don't always pay with exact change or a single card. Madar handles split payments natively—letting you seamlessly split a single order across cash, card, and credit without jumping through menus.

01.title: Split Payments
01.body: Accept any combination of cash, visa, and customer credit seamlessly.

02.title: Exact Change
02.body: Quick-tap buttons for common bill denominations.

03.title: Tip Allocation
03.body: Attribute tips to specific payment methods for accurate reconciliation.

featureCashMovement.title:
Bank-grade cash
movements.
featureCashMovement.body: The cash drawer is treated as a strict ledger. Every time money moves in or out of the drawer for expenses, petty cash, or bank drops, it's explicitly recorded and categorized.

01.title: Petty Cash
01.body: Log mid-shift expenses like ice runs directly on the till.

02.title: Bank Drops
02.body: Securely transfer excess cash out of the drawer.

03.title: Accountability
03.body: Every movement is tagged with the responsible user and a mandatory note.

featureOffline.title:
True Offline
Resilience.
featureOffline.body: When the internet goes down, Madar doesn't just cache basic sales and hope for the best. It uses a persistent write-ahead queue to store every transaction, shift open, and cash movement locally.

01.title: Write-Ahead Queue
01.body: A ledger on every device that safely queues every action.

02.title: Idempotent Sync
02.body: When the connection returns, it syncs everything exactly once. No double charging.

03.title: Uninterrupted Service
03.body: Your tellers never see a loading spinner waiting for the cloud.

featureRecipe.title:
Built-in
Barista Training.
featureRecipe.body: Madar recipes don't just calculate costs—they dictate the workflow. The system shows exact measurements and steps, cutting down training time drastically and ensuring your signature drinks taste the same no matter who is on shift.

01.title: Smart Swaps
01.body: Swap whole milk for oat milk? The system adjusts the cost and deducts the right inventory automatically.

02.title: Quality Control
02.body: Removes the guesswork. Every modifier and instruction is clear.

managementHero.title:
The whole operation,
on one screen.
managementHero.caption: The Madar dashboard — available on Desktop and Web.

managementDetail.title: Headquarters in your browser.
managementDetail.body: Today's revenue by branch. Yesterday's recipes by margin. This month's labor by shift. Everything filterable by anything, everything exportable, everything live. Built for speed and reliability.

01.title: Live analytics
01.body: Across every branch, with totals you can break down by specific payment methods or categories.

02.title: Global Inventory
02.body: One central catalog. Stock tracked uniquely per branch, adjusting instantly as recipes are sold.

03.title: Strict Reconciliation
03.body: Complete shift histories with flagged cash differences.

operations.title: An unshakeable ledger.
operations.lede: Madar isn't just a way to ring sales. It's the operational backbone, built on a strict, append-only architecture that behaves like an accountant.

01.title: Append-Only History
01.body: Every record has a full history. Who created it, who changed it, when, and from what to what. Nothing is ever truly deleted, only voided and logged.

02.title: Smart Inventory Deductions
02.body: Our engine maps complex modifiers directly to stock. Build a custom order, and the specific substitutions are deducted flawlessly.

03.title: Shift Trust
03.body: Because every penny is tied to the ledger, cash handling stops being an exercise in trust and becomes an exercise in math.

featureExport.title:
Exports you can
actually use.
featureExport.body: We abandoned messy CSV dumps. Madar uses a custom generation engine to export beautifully formatted Excel sheets directly from the dashboard, saving your accountant hours of formatting.

01.title: SUM Formulas Included
01.body: Columns automatically sum up. No manual math required.

02.title: Exact Filtering
02.body: Whatever you filter on the screen is exactly what gets exported.

03.title: Instant Delivery
03.body: Generated on the spot. No waiting for a daily scheduled email.

smartPricing.title:
The Menu
Engineer.
smartPricing.lede: Madar watches your sales velocity and item margins simultaneously, utilizing proven menu engineering methodologies to surface exact pricing adjustments.

01.title: Velocity × Margin Matrix
01.body: Every item is scored on a dynamic quadrant, updated continuously, separating your stars from your dogs.

02.title: Defendable Math
02.body: Clear lift / hold / soften calls using 95% confidence intervals. No black-box AI guessing.

03.title: Predictive Impact
03.body: See exactly how much revenue a 15 EGP increase on your Iced Latte might generate next week.

builtToFlex.title: Smart Bundles.
builtToFlex.lede: Build complex menus that flex with your day, your branch, or your specific marketing campaign without confusing the kitchen.

01.title: Dynamic Combos
01.body: Group a coffee, pastry, and side into a single discounted bundle. The system still deducts the exact ingredients for each sub-item perfectly.

02.title: Time-Based Promos
02.body: Set pricing rules that activate automatically during morning rushes or slow afternoons.

pricing.title:
Standardized
Packages.
pricing.lede: Transparent pricing designed to scale with your operation. Choose the tier that matches your business, and save by committing long-term.

roadmap.title: On the roadmap.
roadmap.body: Madar is constantly evolving. Here is what is currently in active development or coming next to enhance your operations.

01.title: Egyptian eInvoicing
01.body: Native tax integration directly with the Egyptian Tax Authority portal to ensure full, automated compliance without manual data entry.

02.title: Public Ordering Menu
02.body: A customer-facing web endpoint where patrons can build orders and view totals. Future updates will route these directly to the teller with flexible delivery zones—free for inside-mall addressing, dynamic fees for outside radiuses.

03.title: Native Talabat Sink
03.body: A direct API pipeline to Talabat, bringing third-party delivery orders directly into the Madar write-ahead queue without needing a secondary tablet.

04.title: Centralized Music Control
04.body: Control and synchronize the ambiance directly from both the teller screen and the dashboard.

backCover.title:
Looking forward to
building together.
backCover.body: Madar isn't just software looking for a customer; it's an operational partnership. We're ready to deploy our system into your branches, customize the logic to your exact needs, and help you scale securely. Standard installs ship with everything here, but we build new screens, fields, and integrations on request.

hero.title: Run the whole shop from one warm ledger.
hero.subtitle: Point of sale, recipe costing, inventory, shifts, delivery and analytics — one bilingual platform that ties what you sell to what it costs. Online or off, in Arabic or English.
hero.caption: The Madar dashboard — live revenue, payment mix and branch performance.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your shop and we'll get you set up. Reach out any time.

offline.label: Keeps selling when the line drops

dashboard.title: Numbers you can act on
dashboard.subtitle: Every order, shift and adjustment rolls up into one trustworthy view — revenue, payment mix, branch performance, and the true cost behind each cup.

analytics.title: Analytics & reports
analytics.desc: Revenue, top items, peak hours, tellers and branch comparison — exportable any time.

recipes.title: Menu & recipe costing
recipes.desc: Build recipes and add-ons per size and know the true cost — and margin — of everything you sell.

bilingual.title: Arabic is a peer, not a translation
bilingual.subtitle: Every layout, number and date reads as native in both directions — Arabic numerals, Cairo time, and a layout that flips cleanly for right-to-left. The same screen, equally at home in either language.

pos.title: A native point of sale, built for the rush
pos.subtitle: A fast native app for the counter — on iPad, Android, Mac, Windows or Linux. Browse the menu, build a cart, split a bill, take cash with live change, fire to the kitchen, and close the drawer with a Z-report. Offline-first, so the line never stops.

order.title: Order & cart
order.desc: Browse the branch menu, build a cart and watch totals add up live — on one fast screen.

tender.title: Tender & split
tender.desc: Split a bill across payment methods, take cash with live change, add a tip, then print.

kitchen.title: Kitchen display
kitchen.desc: Fire tickets to a full-screen kitchen board and bump them line by line.

shift.title: Shifts & Z-report
shift.desc: Open and close the drawer with a counted cash report and a printable shift summary.

features.title: Everything your counter needs
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for cafés and quick-service in Egypt — precise with money, honest with the ledger, and fast where it matters.

pos.title: Fast point of sale
pos.desc: Take orders in seconds with split payments, discounts and instant receipts.

costing.title: Recipe costing
costing.desc: Know the true cost and margin of every cup, per size and add-on.

inventory.title: Append-only inventory
inventory.desc: Counts, transfers, waste and stocktakes — reversed with compensating entries, never edited away.

shifts.title: Shifts & cash
shifts.desc: Open and close drawers, record pay-ins and pay-outs, and reprint Z-reports.

delivery.title: Delivery & channels
delivery.desc: Configure zones and channels, with Talabat online/cash splits handled correctly.

analytics.title: Analytics & reports
analytics.desc: Revenue, peak hours, top items and branch comparison — exportable any time.

multibranch.title: Multi-branch rollups
multibranch.desc: Compare locations and see the whole org at a glance, in one scope bar.

permissions.title: Roles & permissions
permissions.desc: Granular, role-based access for owners, managers and tellers.

customer.title: Order in a few taps — no app to install
customer.subtitle: Scan a QR and your customers get a beautiful bilingual menu: browse, customise each drink, build a cart, and track the order live — on any phone.

cta.title: Ready to run your shop on Madar?
cta.subtitle: Bring point of sale, costing, inventory and analytics into one bilingual system. Talk to us and we'll set you up.

demo.title: You're exploring a live demo
demo.body: Changes are temporary and reset in {{time}}.

go_live.heading: Ready to open your café
go_live.ready: The essentials are in place. Open your café and start taking orders — you can keep refining anytime.
go_live.notReady: Finish the required steps (branch, payments, a category and a menu item) to open your café.

mirror.coverageHint: Add recipes to know every item's margin.

nudge.title: Your café is open · {{done}}/{{total}} set up
nudge.body: Keep building — add recipes, your team and more to unlock cost insights.

menuEngineering.title: Menu Engineering
menuEngineering.subtitle: Profit vs popularity for every item — find your stars and your dead weight (figures are pre-tax)
menuEngineering.emptyHint: Pick a different period or branch from the scope bar.

grid.pasteHint: Paste rows from a spreadsheet (tab- or comma-separated), one row per line.

publicMenu.showBarista: Show this screen to the barista to place your order.
publicMenu.unavailableHint: This menu could not be loaded. Please try again later.

scan.title: Scan to order
scan.body: Scan the QR code at your table or branch to start ordering.
scan.hint: Point your phone's camera at the Madar code

branch.heading: Choose a branch
branch.subtitle: Pick a branch to order from
branch.errorHint: Please check your connection and try again.
branch.noneHint: This restaurant isn't offering delivery right now.

browse.title: Browse the menu
browse.bannerBody: You're previewing the menu — add items now and check out the moment we reopen.
browse.allClosedBody: No channels are taking orders at the moment.
browse.checkoutChooseHint: Choose how to get your order to finish checking out.
browse.checkoutClosedHint: Your cart is saved — pick up right where you left off.
browse.checkoutClosedBody: Every channel is closed at the moment. We've saved your cart — come back when we reopen and check out in a tap.

channel.title: How would you like it?
channel.heading: How would you like it?
channel.subtitle: Choose your delivery type for {{name}}.
channel.inMallHint: Delivered to your shop or office in the mall
channel.outsideHint: Delivered to your address outside the mall
channel.umbrellaHint: Delivered to your beach umbrella or sunbed
channel.pickupHint: Collect your order at the branch
channel.closedBodyInMall: Sorry — in-mall ordering is closed at the moment. Please try delivery, or check back a little later.
channel.closedBodyOutside: Sorry — delivery is closed at the moment. Please try in-mall ordering, or check back a little later.

location.heading: Delivery location
location.title: Pin your location
location.dragHint: Search your address, or tap the map / drag the pin to set your exact spot.
location.outOfRangeHint: Try moving the pin closer to the branch.
location.unavailableHint: We can't deliver to this spot right now.
location.permissionDenied: Location is off — search your address or tap the map to set your spot.
location.searchPlaceholder: Search for your area or address…
location.inMallNote: Your location is used only to confirm you're at the branch.
location.required: We need your location to confirm you're at the branch before you can order.
location.optional: Sharing your location helps us serve you faster, but it's optional — you can continue without it.

menu.title: Menu
menu.unavailableHint: We could not load this menu. Please try again later.
menu.emptyHint: This branch has no items for delivery right now.

customize.selectionNeeded: Complete the required choices to continue

cart.title: Your cart
cart.emptyHint: Add a few items from the menu to get started.
cart.estimate: Final total is confirmed at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Full name
checkout.paymentHint: The teller can change this when confirming your order.
checkout.errPhone: Please enter a valid phone number.
checkout.errChannelClosed: Sorry — this branch just stopped accepting orders on this channel.
checkout.errRange: This location is outside our delivery range.
checkout.errTooManyItems: Your cart has too many items. Please remove some.
checkout.errShop: Please enter the shop or company name.
checkout.errUnit: Please enter the unit or office number.
checkout.errSubmit: Something went wrong placing your order. Please try again.
checkout.errUmbrella: Please enter your umbrella or sunbed number.
checkout.pickupNote: Collect your order at the branch counter — we'll have it ready under your name.

phone.heading: Your number
phone.title: Your phone number
phone.subtitle: We’ll use this to confirm your order and show your past orders.

otp.title: Verify your phone
otp.sent: We sent a code to {{phone}}. Enter it to confirm your order.
otp.errInvalid: That code didn’t work. Try again.
otp.errSend: Couldn’t send the code. Try again.

done.title: Order placed
done.heading: Order placed!
done.message: The branch has received your order and will confirm it shortly.
done.payHint: Pay on delivery — the teller will confirm your payment method.
done.priceUpdatedNote: Your total changed slightly after we confirmed it with the branch.

track.notFoundBody: We couldn't find this order. The link may be incorrect or the order may have been removed.

deliveryTimeline.title: Delivery progress
deliveryTimeline.hint: Skipped steps may be cleared; only reached milestones are timestamped.

delivery.branchSettingsSubtitle: Enable delivery channels, set daily windows, fees, and operating limits for this branch.
delivery.channelsSubtitle: Per-channel price and availability for items and add-ons on this branch.
delivery.errZoneDistanceExists: A zone with this distance already exists
delivery.noZonesHint: Add rings from closest to farthest to quote delivery fees.
delivery.outsideHint: Road-distance delivery to customers outside the mall.
delivery.pickBranch: Select a branch in the top bar to manage its delivery zones
delivery.pickOrg: Select an organization to manage channel overrides
delivery.prepTimeHint: Added to the delivery ETA quoted to the customer.
delivery.otpRequiredHint: Customers verify their phone with a one-time code before ordering. Turn off to let them order without OTP (faster, but unverified).
delivery.settingsSubtitle: Configure per-branch delivery channels, windows, and fees.
delivery.zoneActiveHint: Inactive zones are not used for quoting deliveries.
delivery.zoneFeeHint: Flat fee for deliveries in this ring.
delivery.zoneNameHint: Leave blank to auto-name it by its order.
delivery.zoneSubtitle: Define a delivery ring by its road-distance limit and flat fee.
delivery.zonesSubtitle: Distance-based delivery rings and their pricing for this branch.
delivery.channelDiscountHint: Applied to the item subtotal at checkout — the delivery fee is always charged in full.
delivery.inMallRequireLocationHint: Customers must share their device location to confirm they're at the branch before ordering. Turn off if indoor GPS is unreliable (shop, floor, and unit are always required).
delivery.loadErrorHint: Check your connection and try refreshing.
delivery.umbrellaHint: Delivered to a beach umbrella or sunbed number for a flat fee.
delivery.pickupHint: Customers collect their order at the branch counter. Fee defaults to free.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Link the WhatsApp number that sends delivery OTP codes and order updates.
whatsapp.linked: A number is linked and ready to send.
whatsapp.step2: Tap Settings → Linked devices → Link a device.
whatsapp.step3: Scan this QR code. It refreshes automatically.
whatsapp.notConfiguredHint: Set WHATSAPP_SERVICE_URL on the backend to enable WhatsApp sending.
whatsapp.unreachableHint: The WhatsApp service did not respond. Make sure it is running on the private network.
whatsapp.pauseHint: Mute all WhatsApp messages (OTP + order updates) without unlinking the number.
whatsapp.forbidden: Only super admins can manage the WhatsApp connection.

qr.title: QR Codes
qr.subtitle: Generate scannable QR codes for your online ordering page
qr.pickBranch: Select a branch from the scope bar above

org.title: All-branches QR
org.description: One QR that lets customers browse and pick any of your branches, then place an order.

standard.title: Branch menu QR
standard.description: Customers scan this to open your branch's ordering page. Works for both in-mall and outside delivery.

inMall.title: In-mall delivery QR
inMall.description: Place this QR at a specific spot inside the mall. When customers scan it, the delivery type is locked to in-mall and the location is pre-filled.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Search for a command to run...

kitchen.byItemHint: Override a single item's station. Left on “Inherit”, it follows its category.
kitchen.defaultStationHint: Catches items that aren't routed anywhere else.
kitchen.noStationsForRoutingHint: Add kitchen stations on the Stations tab, then route categories to them.
kitchen.noStationsHint: Add stations like Grill or Bar, then route items to them.
kitchen.pickBranch: Select a branch in the top bar to manage its kitchen
kitchen.routingModeHint: Auto = KDS if stations exist, else the till.
kitchen.routingSubtitle: Send each menu category to a kitchen station. Items inherit their category unless overridden.
kitchen.stationSubtitle: A kitchen area (Grill, Bar…) that shows and prints its routed items.
kitchen.stationsSubtitle: Kitchen areas with printers; route menu items to them on the Order routing tab.

tills.emptyHint: Every branch gets a default till; add more for multiple registers.
tills.isDefaultHint: Used when a shift opens without specifying a till.
tills.name: Name
tills.pageSubtitle: Cash drawers / registers for this branch. Each open shift runs on one till.
tills.pickBranch: Select a branch in the top bar to manage its tills
tills.subtitle: Physical cash drawers / registers for this branch.
tills.title: Tills

insights.pickOrg: Select an organization to see menu profitability

profitability.title: Menu profitability
profitability.costUnknownNote_one: 1 item excluded from margin — cost unknown
profitability.costUnknownNote_other: {{count}} items excluded from margin — cost unknown

target.title: Margin target
target.hint: Rows under this gross-margin bar get flagged.

reason.price_candidate: Top seller under target — suggested price {{price}}

decisions.emptyHint: Fix, dismiss or snooze a flag on the ledger and its measured impact shows up here.
